name: Kor Features
summary: Ability Score Increase.Your Dexterity score increases by 2, and your Wisdom score increases by 1.
bonuses: Ability Score Increase.Your Dexterity score increases by 2, and your Wisdom score increases by 1.
Age.Kor mature at the same rate as humans and live about as long.
Alignment.Most kor are lawful good, with a strong dedication to community and the traditions of their ancestors.
Size.Kor average nearly 6 feet tall, but are much lighter and more slender than humans. Your size is Medium.
Speed.Your base walking speed is 30 feet. You also have a climbing speed of 30 feet as long as you are not encumbered or wearing heavy armor.

traits.name: Age
traits.summary: Kor mature at the same rate as humans and live about as long.

traits.name: Alignment
traits.summary: Most kor are lawful good, with a strong dedication to community and the traditions of their ancestors.

traits.name: Kor Climbing
traits.summary: You have proficiency in the Athletics and Acrobatics skills.

traits.name: Lucky
traits.summary: When you roll a 1 on the d20 for an attack roll, ability check, or saving throw, you can reroll the die and must use the new roll.

traits.name: Brave
traits.summary: You have advantage on saving throws against being frightened.

stats.label: Ability Score Increase
stats.value: Your Dexterity score increases by 2, and your Wisdom score increases by 1.

stats.label: Size
stats.value: Kor average nearly 6 feet tall, but are much lighter and more slender than humans. Your size is Medium.

stats.label: Speed
stats.value: Your base walking speed is 30 feet. You also have a climbing speed of 30 feet as long as you are not encumbered or wearing heavy armor.

stats.label: Languages
stats.value: You can speak, read, and write Common, and communicate in the silent speech of the kor.
